name: Trio ICM
description: The Web3 space has witnessed explosive growth, but a fundamental gap still exists: while communities fuel the success of projects, they rarely share in the actual ownership or revenue. Communities typically gain access only through tokens, which may rise in value if a project succeeds, but true ownership—equity in the platform itself—remains with founders and venture capitalists. Trio Finance aims to change this. Trio Finance is a blockchain-based token launchpad and centralized exchange (CEX) that introduces a groundbreaking model of community ownership. By design, the platform ensures that the community is not just a participant but a stakeholder in every product within its ecosystem.
